task_completion.description: Create a horizontal baseline with a length of 60 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a horizontal line segment in the SolveSpace sketch with a dimension constraint showing '60' or '60.00'.

task_completion.description: Draw two circular arcs connected to the baseline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two distinct curved lines (arcs) originating from the left and right endpoints of the baseline.

task_completion.description: Constrain the left arc's center to the right end of the baseline, and the right arc's center to the left end.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual alignment or constraint symbols indicating that the center point of the left arc coincides exactly with the right endpoint of the baseline, and the center point of the right arc coincides with the left endpoint.

task_completion.description: Constrain both arcs to have a radius of 60 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for radius dimension constraints of '60' or '60.00' on the arcs, or an equality constraint linking the arc radii to the 60 mm baseline.

task_completion.description: Ensure the arcs meet at a single apex to form a symmetric, closed shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the top endpoints of both arcs meeting perfectly at a single point (the apex), forming a closed, pointed arch shape without any gaps or overlapping lines.

task_completion.description: Save the completed file as gothic_arch.slvs in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'gothic_arch.slvs' in the SolveSpace window title bar or within a save dialog navigating to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the SolveSpace application window with its toolbars, property browser, and 3D/2D viewport visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually drew and constrained the geometry rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the drawing process, such as unconstrained lines/arcs, the application of dimension constraints, or the property browser showing active sketch entities.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI modeling process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the geometry was built inside SolveSpace and not generated by running a script or copying an existing .slvs file via the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/gothic_arch.slvs. The equilateral Gothic arch must have a baseline span of 60.0 mm and arc radii of 60.0 mm. Geometrically, this results in an apex height of approximately 51.96 mm. A tolerance of 3.0 mm is acceptable for the dimensions.
